we recently introduced an upgrade to our open-source embedded development platform, CodeFusion Studio 2.0, designed to support embedded system design through integrated workflows for signal processing, edge computing and connectivity
These platforms are part of our broader Physical Intelligence vision, which seeks to leverage our deep expertise in electro-physical systems to develop and fine-tune foundational AI models
